proof.method: reviewed Japanese phonetic-key to same-resource canonical-JP-title mapping, followed by exact current-PC-KO canonical-anchor reuse
proof.token_rule: candidate current and proposal protected-token signatures must be empty and equal
proof.newline_rule: candidate source/current/proposal must each be single-line
proof.event_layout_rule: proposal UTF-16 code-unit count must not exceed the current residual's count
proof.canonical_ko_equality: proposal must equal current PC KO at its canonical anchor coordinate
